name: cs-from-char-style
description: Char style CsChar: cs=true, ascii='Calibri', cs='Arabic Typesetting'. Run 1 uses CsChar. Run 2 has same fonts but no cs.
expected_behavior: Run 1: cs from style -> font_family='Arabic Typesetting'. Run 2: no cs -> font_family='Calibri'.
current_status: GAP-132 — cs from style chain forces cs font slot
